creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: Would you visit this Free Hidden NYC Rooftop Park? #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that if you come to 55 Water Street, turn to your left, go up these stairs, you'll step out into this beautiful elevated free rooftop loaded with greenery, benches, and this stunning waterfront walkway with a view of the East River and the New York City skyline. This is called the Elevated Acre in Lower Manhattan.
